convert_an_uploaded_raster_image_png_or_: Convert an uploaded raster image (PNG or JPG) into a clean editable SVG.
describe_the_svg_you_want_to_generate: Describe the SVG you want to generate...
generate_a_clean_svg_icon_from_a_text: Generate a clean SVG icon from a text prompt and save it to the files store.
generate_an_svg_diagram_that_visualizes_: Generate an SVG diagram that visualizes structured data, then share it.
generate_svg_images_from_text_prompts_or: Generate SVG images from text prompts or vectorize raster images into SVGs using QuiverAI. Supports reference images, style instructions, and multiple output generation.
